meaning: n.捕手,捕捉器,[棒球]接球手
examples: A fog catcher is made of nets with two posts.
A fog catcher can collect 10,000 liters of water a day.
In twelve years as a snake catcher, Heather has never touched a snake.
The Dodgers recalled catcher Tim Federowicz from Triple-A Albuquerque to take Kemp's place on the roster.
Catcher Brian McCann, however, reminded Minor that there was still work to do on the mound.
